request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you hear about the recent security lapses in our cities? While we focus on debates, others exploit our divisions. Strong domestic security powers aren't about control—they're about protecting our communities. We've seen what happens when we're unprepared. Let's ensure our agencies have the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
